name: TagInput
description: Input that turns entries into removable tag chips.

api.name: TagInput
api.description: Input that turns entries into removable tag chips.

parameters.name: Tags
parameters.description: The committed tags, rendered as removable chips before the text input. Two-way bindable via TagsChanged.

parameters.name: TagsChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever a tag is added or removed, with the full updated list.

parameters.name: MaxTags
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags allowed. 0 (default) means unlimited; once reached, the input disables and MaxTagsHelperText shows.

parameters.name: AllowDuplicates
parameters.description: Allows the same value to be added more than once (by default, a duplicate add and duplicate suggestions are suppressed).

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown in the text input while no tags are present. Falls back to the localized "TagInput.Placeholder" string when null; hidden once at least one tag exists.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the input and hides each chip's remove button.

parameters.name: Suggestions
parameters.description: Candidate values shown in the autocomplete dropdown as the user types, filtered to those matching the current input text and (unless AllowDuplicates) not already tagged.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the text input.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state and any live ValidateInput/ ValidateInputAsync failure.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when invalid (and no live validation error is active). Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when not invalid and not at the MaxTags limit. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the input. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The text input's name attribute. Falls back to the ambient FormField's name when null.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the field's container div.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the inner text <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: MaxTagsHelperText
parameters.description: Message shown once MaxTags is reached (in place of HelperText). Falls back to the localized "TagInput.MaxTagsReached" string when null.

parameters.name: GetTagText
parameters.description: Converts a tag to its display text on a chip. Falls back to item?.ToString() when null — required for a non-string TItem to render sensibly.

parameters.name: GetSuggestionText
parameters.description: Converts a candidate to its display text in the suggestions dropdown. Falls back to GetTagText, then item?.ToString().

parameters.name: TagTemplate
parameters.description: Custom render fragment for a chip's content, replacing the default text span (the remove button still renders alongside it).

parameters.name: SuggestionTemplate
parameters.description: Custom render fragment for a suggestion row's content, replacing GetSuggestionText.

parameters.name: Separators
parameters.description: Characters that, when typed or pasted, split the current input into separate tags (each trimmed segment is added via CreateTag or, for TItem = string, used as-is). Defaults to [","].

parameters.name: ValidateInput
parameters.description: Synchronous validator run against free-text input before it becomes a tag. Returning a non-null string rejects the input and shows it as the field's error message. Run before ValidateInputAsync.

parameters.name: ValidateInputAsync
parameters.description: Asynchronous validator run after ValidateInput passes. Returning a non-null string rejects the input and shows it as the field's error message.

parameters.name: CreateTag
parameters.description: Converts validated free text into a . Required when is not string — otherwise free-text entry throws. Return null to silently discard the input.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the field's container div.

events.name: TagsChanged
events.description: Raised whenever a tag is added or removed, with the full updated list.

examples.title: Generic TItem — User picker
examples.code: public record UserOption(string Name, string Email); private List _users = new(); private List _suggestions = new() { /* … */ }; @user.Name @user.Name @user.Email

slots.name: TagTemplate
slots.description: Custom render fragment for a chip's content, replacing the default text span (the remove button still renders alongside it).

slots.name: SuggestionTemplate
slots.description: Custom render fragment for a suggestion row's content, replacing GetSuggestionText.

mdSummary:
# TagInput

Input that turns entries into removable tag chips.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tag-input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TagInput | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| TagInput | Tags | `List<TItem>?` | `` | The committed tags, rendered as removable chips before the text input. Two-way bindable via TagsChanged. |
| TagInput | TagsChanged | `EventCallback<List<TItem>>` | `` | Raised whenever a tag is added or removed, with the full updated list. |
| TagInput | MaxTags | `int` | `` | Maximum number of tags allowed. 0 (default) means unlimited; once reached, the input disables and MaxTagsHelperText shows. |
| TagInput | AllowDuplicates | `bool` | `` | Allows the same value to be added more than once (by default, a duplicate add and duplicate suggestions are suppressed). |
| TagInput | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown in the text input while no tags are present. Falls back to the localized "TagInput.Placeholder" string when null; hidden once at least one tag exists. |
| TagInput | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables the input and hides each chip's remove button. |
| TagInput | Suggestions | `List<TItem>?` | `` | Candidate values shown in the autocomplete dropdown as the user types, filtered to those matching the current input text and (unless AllowDuplicates) not already tagged. |
| TagInput | Required | `bool` | `` | Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the text input. |
| TagInput | Invalid | `bool` | `` | Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state and any live ValidateInput/ ValidateInputAsync failure. |
| TagInput | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when invalid (and no live validation error is active). Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot). |
| TagInput | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when not invalid and not at the MaxTags limit. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField). |
| TagInput | Label | `string?` | `` | Field label rendered above the input. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label. |
| TagInput | Name | `string?` | `` | The text input's name attribute. Falls back to the ambient FormField's name when null. |
| TagInput | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the field's container div. |
| TagInput | AutoFocus | `bool` | `` | Focuses the inner text <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM. |
| TagInput | MaxTagsHelperText | `string?` | `` | Message shown once MaxTags is reached (in place of HelperText). Falls back to the localized "TagInput.MaxTagsReached" string when null. |
| TagInput | GetTagText | `Func<TItem, string>?` | `` | Converts a tag to its display text on a chip. Falls back to item?.ToString() when null — required for a non-string TItem to render sensibly. |
| TagInput | GetSuggestionText | `Func<TItem, string>?` | `` | Converts a candidate to its display text in the suggestions dropdown. Falls back to GetTagText, then item?.ToString(). |
| TagInput | TagTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` | Custom render fragment for a chip's content, replacing the default text span (the remove button still renders alongside it). |
| TagInput | SuggestionTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` | Custom render fragment for a suggestion row's content, replacing GetSuggestionText. |
| TagInput | Separators | `string[]` | `new[] { "," }` | Characters that, when typed or pasted, split the current input into separate tags (each trimmed segment is added via CreateTag or, for TItem = string, used as-is). Defaults to [","]. |
| TagInput | ValidateInput | `Func<string, string?>?` | `` | Synchronous validator run against free-text input before it becomes a tag. Returning a non-null string rejects the input and shows it as the field's error message. Run before ValidateInputAsync. |
| TagInput | ValidateInputAsync | `Func<string, Task<string?>>?` | `` | Asynchronous validator run after ValidateInput passes. Returning a non-null string rejects the input and shows it as the field's error message. |
| TagInput | CreateTag | `Func<string, TItem?>?` | `` | Converts validated free text into a . Required when is not string — otherwise free-text entry throws. Return null to silently discard the input. |
| TagInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the field's container div. |

## Slots
- `TagTemplate` (TagInput) — Custom render fragment for a chip's content, replacing the default text span (the remove button still renders alongside it).
- `SuggestionTemplate` (TagInput) — Custom render fragment for a suggestion row's content, replacing GetSuggestionText.

## Events
- `TagsChanged` (`EventCallback<List<TItem>>`) — Raised whenever a tag is added or removed, with the full updated list.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<TagInput />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`
